g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot service method that fetches shop operating hours and generates the raw list of time slots for a given date')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot logic that generates raw time slots from shop operating hours — e.g. 8am to 5pm in 60-minute increments')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot query that fetches all existing appointments for a given date that are not cancelled, including their start time and duration')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot query that looks up the duration_minutes for the selected service type — needed to check if a slot has enough room')
sendPrompt('Explain the overlap detection algorithm — how does the system determine if a new slot start_time + duration conflicts with an existing appointment?')
sendPrompt('What additional checks should be done before marking a slot as available — e.g. past time check, max concurrent jobs, slot buffer time?')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot controller response format for available slots — what the JSON response looks like with available and unavailable slots for a date')
